label: PASS
rationale: After CreateRow omitted the C_EC_521 curve-parameter columns p, r, b, x, and y, the Get returned the documented P-521 default values for columns 3 through 7. The cited value section says these values are defaults when not specified at table creation.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_EC_521 column 3, p, was omitted at creation and therefore should have been populated with the documented P-521 default, but the Get returned 0. Returning zero instead of the specified default is not protocol-compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: After CreateRow omitted the C_EC_163 curve defaults, the Get returned the documented K-163 defaults: k1=07, k2=06, k3=03, r, a=01, b, x, and y. The value section requires these defaults for new rows when not specified at table creation.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_EC_163 column 3, k1, was omitted at creation and should have defaulted to the documented K-163 value 07, but the Get returned 0. That violates the required default behavior for omitted curve-parameter columns.

label: PASS
rationale: The C_EC_233 row was created without the fixed K-233 curve-parameter values, and the Get returned the documented defaults for k, r, a, b, x, and y. This matches the cited requirement that the TPer track and set these defaults for new objects.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_EC_233 column 3, k, was omitted at creation and should have defaulted to the documented K-233 value 4A, but the Get returned 0. The response therefore fails the default-value requirement.

label: PASS
rationale: The C_EC_283 row was created without the fixed K-283 curve-parameter values, and the Get returned the documented defaults for k1, k2, k3, r, a, b, x, and y. This is consistent with the cited default tracking requirement.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_EC_283 column 3, k1, was omitted at creation and should have defaulted to the documented K-283 value 0C, but the Get returned 0. That is not compliant with the required defaults for omitted curve-parameter columns.
